subcodes.title: Words to Bishop Birch, spoken on 1912-04-17
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, that stupendous material developments are obtained in this country
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @East and West; communication between East and West, @harmony of science and religion, @praise of Western values; culture, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
